name: audit
description: Security audit — scan codebase for OWASP top 10, exposed secrets, dependency vulnerabilities, and misconfigurations.

name: changelog
description: Generate a changelog from recent git commits across projects.

name: decision
description: Log a decision with context and reasoning. Use when a choice was made and the team should know why.

name: followup
description: Draft a follow-up email after a meeting using customer context and brand voice from the brain.

name: icp
description: Build an Ideal Customer Profile. Researches a target persona, identifies pain points, buying triggers, and objections with real data.

name: inbox
description: Organize your inbox. Classifies emails using brain context, applies labels, archives. Run /inbox setup to configure your preferences.

name: incident
description: Incident response — create a structured incident report with timeline, impact assessment, and action items.

name: legal
description: Generate legal documents (NDA, subscription agreement, demo agreement, PSA, order form) from templates with customer details filled in.

name: pentest-prep
description: Prepare for a penetration test. Generates scope, checklists, and documentation for the engagement.

name: prep
description: Prep for a customer call — pulls account history, recent interactions, open issues from the brain.

name: recap
description: Show what changed in the brain since last recap. Use 'recap send' to write it as a shareable document.

name: review
description: Code review using the team's coding standards and architecture context from the brain.

name: search
description: Search across the entire brain for a topic, keyword, or question.

name: secrets
description: Find exposed secrets and credentials in the codebase. Scan for API keys, passwords, tokens, and private keys.

name: spec
description: Write a technical spec from a description, using architecture and project context from the brain.

name: standards
description: Generate coding standards from your existing codebase. Infers patterns from what's already there.

name: status
description: Show brain health — departments, freshness, gaps, and coverage.

name: threat-model
description: Generate a threat model from architecture context. Uses STRIDE methodology to identify threats and mitigations.

name: tps
description: Generate a TPS report — what was built, fixed, and shipped. From git history, not memory.

name: twins
description: Create AI twin personas for market testing. Build a panel of realistic personas from your ICPs, then test messaging, pricing, or features against them.

name: voc
description: Run a Voice of Customer analysis. Research how a persona talks about their problems, extract themes, and validate with real data.

name: write
description: Write anything — blog posts, emails, proposals, docs — using brand voice and brain context. Just say what you need.
